hero.subtitle: CS Student & Applied LLM Engineer
hero.description: Final-year CS student with research and industry experience in LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and backend engineering. Built production systems at CMU and contributed to joint research at JAIST.

about.title: About Me
about.heading: Engineering Intelligent Systems for Unstructured Data
about.paragraph1: I specialize at the intersection of Large Language Models and Knowledge Graphs, focusing on building systems that extract meaning from chaotic, unstructured data. My goal is to move past basic API wrappers and engineer AI solutions that solve actual business logic problems.
about.paragraph2: Looking to grow as an Applied LLM Engineer on an early-stage team where I can contribute to building innovative AI products while continuing to learn and develop my skills.

jaist.title: AI/ML Research Intern
bullets: Built a prompt engineering pipeline (DoC) for LLM-based information extraction with 68% improvement over state-of-the-art
Tested and debugged LLM outputs at scale, applying domain constraints to filter implausible responses
Achieved 100% accuracy in automated structured data population from unstructured documents

french.title: Backend Developer (Contract)
french.organization: Chiang Mai University, Dept. of Western Languages (French)
bullets: Developed a platform integrating French language learning with interactive lessons and personalized guidance
Built backend infrastructure including database management, API endpoints, and server configuration

ags.title: DevOps (Contract)
ags.organization: Chiang Mai University, Dept. of Computer Science
bullets: Built production LLM application using GPT-3.5 with structured prompt engineering
Reduced grading turnaround time by 80% (5 days → 1 day) for 80+ students while managing inference costs
Designed and deployed secure REST API with Flask and SQLAlchemy, containerized with Docker
Automated deployment via GitHub Actions CI/CD on AWS (ECS, Aurora, S3)

ta.title: Teaching Assistant
bullets: Mentored 50+ undergraduate students in Python programming, focusing on core concepts and best practices
Authored comprehensive software setup guides to ensure smooth access to development tools

ags.title: AGS - Automated Grading System
ags.description: A production LLM application using structured prompt engineering to automate grading. Reduces turnaround time by 80% for 80+ students.

ezaAlias.description: Popular Gist providing comprehensive alias setup for eza (modern ls replacement). Used by developers worldwide.

neovim.description: Contributor to Neovim - Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability with modern features.

publications.title: Academic Contributions
publications.heading: Publications &
publications.emptyStateDescription: Academic contributions will be listed here as they become available

kg-rag-jaist.tldr: Leveraged knowledge graphs and ontologies to automatically generate critical safety evaluation scenarios for Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS).

ontology-phsrs.tldr: Built a semantic web system using OWL ontologies to recommend appropriate public health services based on patient symptoms and medical history.

cs-setup-guide.tldr: Created comprehensive documentation to help 250+ CS students set up their development environments, reducing setup time from days to hours.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Let's
